plugins.name: open-forge
plugins.description: Automate self-hosting of open-source apps on cloud or local infra — provisioning, Docker/Podman/native/Kubernetes, DNS, TLS, SMTP, inbound email. Hundreds of verified recipes (Ghost, OpenClaw, Ollama, Open WebUI, ComfyUI, Dify, LibreChat, AnythingLLM, Vaultwarden, Immich, and more).
